Package app.gui.views

Class MenuPanel.ButtonPanelPair

java.lang.Object
app.gui.views.MenuPanel.ButtonPanelPair
Enclosing class:
MenuPanel
private static class MenuPanel.ButtonPanelPair extends Object
Logical support record aimed at pairing a menu header button with its respective content panel.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    (package private) MenuTabButton
    button
    The toggle button designated for selecting this specific tab.
    (package private) JPanel
    panel
    The linked container panel displayed upon button activation.

    Constructor
    Description
    ButtonPanelPair(MenuTabButton button, JPanel panel)
    Standard direct assignment constructor for the button-panel pair.
